headline: A landing page used to cost $15,000
Type what you want. Get a landing page in seconds.
body: Aura.build creates production-ready landing page designs in seconds. You type what you want. It generates the layout, typography, color system, and responsive behavior. Then exports to HTML and Figma.

headline: 2-4 weeks and $5K-$25K becomes 60 seconds
body: The average agency charges $5,000 to $25,000 for a single landing page with a 2-4 week timeline. Aura.build delivers comparable output in under 60 seconds. The cost difference is not incremental. It is categorical.
image_keyword: cost time comparison agency vs AI

headline: Skip 60-70% of design time: the blank canvas phase
body: Figma exports mean designers can still refine the output. This is not about replacing designers. It is about skipping the blank canvas phase that takes 60-70% of total design time on any project.
image_keyword: design blank canvas skip to refinement

headline: Trained on conversions, not just aesthetics
body: Aura.build is trained on high-converting landing page patterns, not just aesthetics. The designs it produces are structured for conversion: clear hierarchy, strategic whitespace, and CTAs placed where they actually get clicked.

headline: 5-10x more A/B test variants at near zero cost
body: Early users report launching 5-10x more landing page variants for A/B testing because the cost of creating each variant dropped to near zero. More experiments, more data, faster optimization cycles.

headline: The design cost curve just bent. Follow for more AI design tools.
